mentions.note: Trades <20x earnings with only 1% organic growth (management guidance 3–4% later). Systematically overvalued relative to growth; capital flowing away from legacy biopharma vendors.

Solid quarter (revenue beat, 19-cent EPS beat, full-year guidance raised substantially); organic growth 1% but pharma/biotech (60% revenue) mid-single-digit with strengthening orders; biotech funding flowing, AI-enabled discovery via Nvidia collab driving autonomous labs; market has reaction wrong.
Buy at 19x earnings—cheap given IPO machine demand for TMO instruments; companies need equipment for scaling.
